meaning: n.惯性滑行adj.惯性滑行的,随心所欲的
examples: He has given up his freewheeling lifestyle to settle down with his baby daughter.
On the descents, cyclists spin past cars, freewheeling downhill at tremendous speed.
But the freewheeling nature of the Internet could surprise even Mr. Murong.
The net is also being cast over markets in which freewheeling growth contributed to the crisis.
What Brown forsees is beyond the famous freewheeling Silicon Valley atmosphere of a Google or Yahoo.
